questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '207bf0e8-0dc5-467b-8753-ed85619e01a4' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '7ca194f2-7035-4a85-8f74-7292951196eb'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '207bf0e8-0dc5-467b-8753-ed85619e01a4'; delete from question_items where id = '207bf0e8-0dc5-467b-8753-ed85619e01a4';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
